name: Palindrome Partitioning (Min Cuts)
description: Find the minimum number of cuts to partition a string into all palindromes.
intuition: First build palindrome[i][j] table. Then dp[i] = min cuts for s[0..i]. If s[0..i] is palindrome, dp[i]=0. Otherwise dp[i] = min(dp[j]+1) where s[j+1..i] is palindrome.
